# chronosphere_derived_metric (Resource)

A virtual metric whose value is computed on demand from one of several underlying PromQL queries. The query selected at evaluation time is determined by matching the usage's labels against the configured selectors.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `metric_name` (String) Name of the derived metric as referenced in queries. Must be unique across the system.
- `name` (String) Display name of the derived metric. Can be changed after creation.
- `queries` (Block List, Min: 1) Ordered list of selector/query pairs. When the derived metric is used, the first entry whose `selector` matches the usage's labels supplies the PromQL `query`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--queries))

### Optional

- `description` (String) Free-form description of the derived metric.
- `slug` (String) Stable identifier for the derived metric. Generated from `name` if omitted. Immutable after creation.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--queries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `queries`

Required:

- `query` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) PromQL query executed when this selector matches. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--queries--query))

Optional:

- `selector` (Block List, Max: 1) Label matchers that must be present on the derived metric usage for this query to be selected. If omitted, the query matches any usage. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--queries--selector))

<a id="nestedblock--queries--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `queries.query`

Required:

- `expr` (String) PromQL expression for the derived metric. References declared variables using `$name` syntax (e.g. `cpu_usage{$service}`).

Optional:

- `variables` (Block List) Variables that can be substituted into `expr` at query time as label selectors. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--queries--query--variables))

<a id="nestedblock--queries--query--variables"></a>
### Nested Schema for `queries.query.variables`

Required:

- `default_selector` (String) PromQL label selector used when no override is supplied by the derived metric usage.
- `name` (String) Variable name as referenced in `expr` (e.g. `service` for `$service`).



<a id="nestedblock--queries--selector"></a>
### Nested Schema for `queries.selector`

Optional:

- `labels` (Map of String) Labels that must match (key/value) on the derived metric usage for the selector to apply.
